message:
The other day, I was rummaging through my closet and stumbled upon my old go-bag. You know, the one I put together with all the best intentions? Well, it turns out that the granola bars I packed back in 2018 were more like little bricks than snacks! 😂 I couldn’t help but laugh at my ‘preparedness’ skills. 

It’s funny how life can throw a curveball when you least expect it. But it also reminded me that even the best plans can go a bit awry. A little refresh on what to include in our go-bags is always a good idea. 

Have you ever found something in your emergency kit that made you chuckle?
